input.user_input: Remove the recitals section entirely from this asset purchase agreement. They're unnecessary and my client wants a cleaner document.

actual: Please upload or attach the asset purchase agreement you are referring to. Once you provide the document, I can remove the recitals section for you and ensure the rest of the agreement is properly formatted and numbered.
